title: root64
description: Something mysterious is spreading from the root.
body: ###### aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vQFdpbGRIdW50ZXIyOTE= #### Note: ###### This mod is based off an arg and correlates to it. This is a very early version and I want to see what you guys think. More will be added later, and drop any suggestions in the comments. **Curseforge and Modrinth are the only sites this mod is uploaded to as of now, do not reupload to any other sites. (I uploaded on MCreator's official site too)** ### **Important:** #### **Shaders will mess up the aesthetic in some of the dimensions.** # \--root64-- A new mod I've been working on for the past month. It adds new dimensions, entities, and events. Entering a nether portal has a chance to send you to a weird new dimension. You might want to watch out for an entity that looks like you…   **I also really recommend you use [Kartixx's Alpha Sound Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/alpha-sound-pack) along with any alpha resource/texture packs along with this mod to enhance the experience. There are even some good alpha terrain mods that go along well with this mod.**   ###### I also want to thank you guys for noticing and popularizing my previous mod, [corruption29285](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corruption29285), and even making videos reviewing it. I hope you guys will enjoy this mod just as much and im excited to hear your feedback. Review this mod: https://mmcreviews.com/all/mods/root64/  ## \----Credits---- ##### [Mcreator](https://mcreator.net/) - Helped me out with creating the mod, still coded almost all of the features myself though. ###### My Discord: m7\_apg
